title: Composer Project Configuration
description: The composer.json file at the root of a Composer-instrumented project. Declares workspace location, catalog-authoring engine, and optional parent adapter for inheritance.

workspace.description: Path to the workspace folder relative to composer.json. The workspace contains catalog/, templates/, specs/, output.map.ts, and the engine cache.

engine.description: Pinned catalog-authoring engine package and semver-major. v0.1 supports only @composer/typescript@1.

extends.description: Optional parent adapter package and semver-major. When set, the parent's content is loaded first and the workspace content layers on top per documented resolution rules. When omitted, the workspace is fully self-contained.

limits.description: Optional compose/lock tunables (005). The lock TTL must be >= the compose budget plus a safety margin; env vars COMPOSER_COMPOSE_MAX_DURATION_MS and COMPOSER_LOCK_MAX_HOLD_MS override these.

maxComposeDurationMs.description: Wall-clock budget for a single compose, in milliseconds (default 120000).

maxHoldMs.description: Lock TTL: a lock older than this is reclaimed even if its PID is alive, in milliseconds (default 180000).

$schema.description: Optional reference to this JSON Schema for editor support.
